order.heading: Drag to rank your photos — 1 appears first in the flipbook
order.hint: Drag cards to set the order. Photo 1 will appear first in the flipbook.

flipbook.title: Your Flipbook
flipbook.goBack: Go back to search and select images.

feature.heading: Shared Vision
feature.body: We are shaping spaces that work for everyone — built on listening, inclusion, and collective care.
feature.sideBody: Accessible environments shaped by the needs of the whole community.

story.heading: Living Together
story.col1: Our shared spaces reflect what we value: inclusion, sustainability, and a commitment to the wellbeing of all who live here.
story.col2: When every voice is heard, the spaces we share become truly ours.

closing.ctaBody: Your voice shapes our shared future. Join the conversation.
